titleStmt.title: SII 24.560: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 560.

summary.p: Records the restoration to Kumāra Veṅkaṭa Varadāchārya, son of Varadāchārya and grandson of Āchchi Śrīraṅganārāyaṇāchārya of the Gārgya-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā, by Raṅgakṛishṇa-Muddu-Vīrappa-Nāyaka of the Viśvanātha Nāyaka family, of the tīrtham and other privileges which had been in the enjoyment of the family from the time of Uḍaiyavar (Rāmānuja) but which had lapsed when his ancestor Āchchi Śrīraṅganārāyaṇāchārya had gone to the north where his disciples were in considerable number and stayed there for a long time. The record is dated in Śaka 1613, Pramōdūta Bhādrapada, śu. 15, Paurṇami, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1690 A.D., September 8.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadraṅgēśamātā
varadaguruvaraḥ pū
¨rnasūrēḥ kkumāraḥ sēvyaśrīyā
munā ḷyaṁti varakṛpayāsī
tpurōdhāstu śaurēḥ . sthānācāryaśca ya
ntatkujaladhiśaśī veṁggipuryācciraṁgī raṁgē
nārāyaṇākhyō jayati guruvarassarvataṁ
tra svataṁtraḥ . śrīpū¨rṇaputraṁ prativīkṣyaraṁ
ggī svabhūsthatailaṁ parimā¨rjayaṁttaṁ . manmātṛ
kṛtyōsti bhavānmamāccītyāhā svayaṁ drāviḍa
mātṛnāmnā . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakābdaṁbvulu vēyinni Arunū
ṭa padumūḍu Agunēṭi pramōdūta saṁ
vatsara bhādrapada śu 1 5lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja mahārājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīvīradēvamahārāyalala īs written above the line.Ayyavāru
ghanagiri nagaramaṁddu ratnasiṁhvāsanāsīnulai pṛthvī
sāmrājyaṁ śēyucunnuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīmadvēdamā¨rga
pratiṣṭhā pūrvakōbhaya vēdāṁttācāryulayina śrī śau
rirāja purōhituleyina gā¨rgyagōtraṁ Āśvalā
yanasūtraṁ ṛkcākhādhyāyulaina Ācciraṁgganārāya
ṇācāryulavāri pautṛlayina varadācāryulavāri putṛlai
na kumāraveṁkkaṭavaradācā¨rllayyavāriki kāśyapugōtraṁ
mudduvīrappanāyanivāri pautṛlaina cokkanāthanāyanivā
ri putṛlaina viśvanāthanāyani raṁgakṛṣṇa mudduvīrappanāyaniṁgāru
bhādrapada śu 15 lu sōmōparāga puṇyakālamaṁdu sahi
raṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvakamugānu Iccina tī¨rthādidānadha¨rmaśāsa
nakramameṭlannanu śrīraṁgganāyakulu pūrvaṁ māvo
rini mātṛtvēna Abhimāniṁcciri ganaka māku voḍaya
varu kālāpanuṁccinni tī¨rthaṁ Aruḷappāḍu rugvēda
viṁnapaṁ śrībhāṣyaviṁnapaṁ modalayina svataṁtra svā
myamuluṁ Anubhaviṁccukōvuṁḍḍiri vuttaradēśamaṁddu śighya
lu bahugā vuṁnnāru ganaka Akkaḍiki veṁccēśi Akkaḍanē konnidi
namulu vuṁḍḍiriganaka Aṁttarapaḍivuṁnnani māku kaṭṭaḍa
cāyavalenani mātō palakariṁccitiri ganaka śrīraṁgganārā
yaṇajīyyaru vyāsabhaṭṭaru parāśarabhaṭṭaru modalaina
Anaṁttakottu parikaramu tī¨rthaṁ Aruḷappāḍu moda
layina svataṁtra svāmyamulu kaddu māku saṁmma
taṁ Avaśyaṁ naḍipiṁccavalenani mātō palakariṁccitē
nu bhaṭṭaruvāriki venaka periyanaṁbbigāriki munukalagā
nu tī¨rthaṁ Aruḷappāḍuṁnnu rugvēda vinnapaṁ
śrībhāṣyaṁviṁnnapaṁ tamaku pūrvamaṁddu naḍicina
tōṁpumōdalayina svataṁtramulunnu reṭṭiṁpā
gānuṁnnu gra
haṇapuṁṇyakālamaṁddu sahiraṇyōdakadhārāpū
rvakamugānu dattaṁcēśināraṁganaka tī¨rthaṁ Aruḷu
ppāḍu rugvēdaAn attempt to deliberately erase thisviṁnnapaṁ śrībhāṣyaviṁnnapaṁ tō
ṁpumōdalayina svataṁtramulu Anubhaviṁccu
koni mēmu dattaṁcēśina tirumāḷighēlō vāsaṁcēsuko
ni tī¨rthaṁ rugvēdaṁAn attempt to deliberatelyśrībhāṣyaṁ tirumāḷighē moda
laina svataṁtrālu dānādivinimaya vikrayayō
gyapūrvakaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā putrapautrapāraṁpa
ni vuṁḍagalavārulu
Digital edition of SII 24.560 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
